coverage_explanation: The existing class eucn:FermentedBeverage already fully captures the concept for CN heading 2206 (other fermented beverages: cider, perry, mead, saké; mixtures of fermented beverages; mixtures of fermented beverages and non-alcoholic beverages). The hasValue restriction anchors the class to the 8-digit code 220600 (correcting the prior 4-digit code '2206'). A someValuesFrom restriction on eucn:producedBy links the class to eucn:FruitFermentation as the representative production process. However, the legal text also describes (a) mixtures of fermented beverages with each other and (b) mixtures of fermented beverages with non-alcoholic beverages as two distinct mixture sub-cases, and (c) the residual character-retention rule for fermentation products. These sub-cases cannot be fully modelled without introducing mixture-type classes or a 'character retention' quality, which would over-commit the ontology at this stage. Coverage is therefore estimated at 0.75.
